name: Domaine du Rayol - Le Jardin des Méditerranées
summary: Mediterranean garden with landscapes from comparable climates worldwide, seasonal activities and a marine-garden/underwater-trail angle; just outside the core gulf but relevant as a premium half-day nature detour.
parking_notes: Official access/parking details still need practical check before publication.
best_time: Spring, early summer or autumn; avoid treating peak hot afternoons as default.

name: Fort-Freinet
summary: Fortified medieval site above La Garde-Freinet, accessible only on foot, with castrum remains and broad Massif des Maures context.
parking_notes: Official page mentions access from the village or Parking de la Croix; exact parking logistics to verify.
best_time: Clear morning or late afternoon; avoid wet or windy conditions because the official page warns of a steep path.

name: Pont des Fées
summary: Former water-supply aqueduct/heritage site below Grimaud, useful as a quieter heritage walk paired with the village rather than Port Grimaud crowds.
parking_notes: Parking and walking route from Grimaud village need local verification.
best_time: Morning or shoulder season, especially if pairing with Grimaud village.

name: Moulin de Paillas
summary: Restored windmill area above Ramatuelle on the exposed Paillas ridge, with strong viewpoint potential over village, vineyards and coast.
parking_notes: Road/parking and access limits need official confirmation.
best_time: Golden hour or clear mistral-after day; avoid overselling until access is checked.

name: Phare du Cap Camarat
summary: Lighthouse and protected coastal headland context near Cap Camarat; useful for a restrained viewpoint/nature note rather than a beach recommendation.
parking_notes: Access, parking and any restricted areas near lighthouse/semaphore need official confirmation.

name: Chapelle Sainte-Anne

parking_notes: Parking/access and exact public opening days need official confirmation.

name: Cimetière marin de Saint-Tropez

parking_notes: Best approached on foot from the Citadelle/old town; access rules and opening hours need official confirmation.
